decisions.title_en: Huawei unveils Tau Scaling Law + LogicFolding to target 1.4nm-equivalent chips by 2031
decisions.source: Huawei Newsroom / SCMP / Bloomberg / Tom's Hardware
decisions.reason: story_key not in 7-day lookback. Huawei announced at IEEE ISCAS Shanghai on 5-25 a new 'Tau Scaling Law' temporal scaling framework + 'LogicFolding' stacked architecture claiming 55% density gain and 41% power efficiency boost; target 1.4nm-equivalent density by 2031, first Kirin chips this fall, Ascend AI processors by 2030. Major sanctions-busting / post-Moore narrative.

decisions.title_en: Magnifica Humanitas 42,300-word text formally released; Pope urges 'disarm AI', Olah says AI 'too big for big tech alone'
decisions.source: CNN / NBC / CBS / NCRegister / Anthropic blog
decisions.reason: story_key appeared in lookback on 2026-05-18, 2026-05-23, and 2026-05-25 (the 5-25 item covered the announcement of the release ceremony happening that day). Today's substantive new info: actual encyclical text (42,300 words) is now public, Pope's direct 'disarm AI' centerpiece quote, AI 'must not remain in hands of few', warning of AI fueling warfare; Olah's specific remarks ('AI is too big for big tech alone', 'we need informed critics who will tell the labs when we are failing'); Pope's reciprocal 'great sign of hope' statement to Olah. None of this content was in prior coverage.

decisions.title_en: Tesla Sr. Staff Engineer Yun-Ta Tsai publicly confirms Grok Build extensively used in FSD + Cybercab development
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. First named senior Tesla AI engineer to publicly disclose Grok's depth in active FSD and Cybercab software development; moves xAI-Tesla AI integration from high-level Musk statements to on-record engineering confirmation.

decisions.title_en: Jensen Huang lands Taipei 9 days ahead of GTC Taipei keynote; Vera Rubin ramp strains Taiwan supply chain
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Jensen Huang arrived at Songshan Airport 5-23 ahead of June 1 GTC Taipei keynote + June 2-5 Computex 2026 ('AI Together'); Vera Rubin platform has ~2M parts per unit and 150 Taiwan ecosystem partners, straining supply chain. Novel forward-looking event with 3-day-old anchor.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI launches $4B Deployment Company with TPG/Advent/Bain/Brookfield + Tomoro acquisition
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-05-11 is 15 days old (>5 day limit). Was widely covered in earlier briefings.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic in early talks with Microsoft for Maia 200 AI chip
decisions.reason: Already published on 2026-05-21 in briefing. Today's coverage repeats: 'still in talks, no deal signed, both declined comment'. No substantive new information.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic $30B+ funding round expected to close 'as soon as next week'
decisions.reason: Already published on 2026-05-22 with $900B valuation, $30B size, Sequoia/Dragoneer/Altimeter/Greenoaks ~$2B each as lead investors. As of today, the round is still 'expected to close this week' — no confirmation of actual close, no new investor disclosure, no new financial detail.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic Q2 revenue $10.9B / first operating profit $559M
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-05-20 is 6 days old (>5 day limit). Already covered in prior briefing.

decisions.title_en: Cursor releases Composer 2.5 with 25x synthetic task training
decisions.reason: Already published on 2026-05-18 in briefing. Today only repeats benchmark numbers and pricing. No substantive new information.

decisions.title_en: Trump AI EO leaked text + clearinghouse details
decisions.reason: Already published on 2026-05-21 (Trump pulled signing) and 2026-05-22 (leaked text). No new development between 5-22 and 5-26 — no new signing date, no new text changes.

decisions.title_en: StartupHub 5-25 framing essay: 'Four labs, four acquisitions in five days' marks AI consolidation phase
decisions.reason: Although the framing essay was published 5-25, the underlying deals — Anthropic+Stainless (5-18 already covered), Mistral+Emmi (5-19, freshness-DROP), Meta+Dreamer (date unclear), Google DeepMind+Contextual AI (date unclear) — are all either already published or outside freshness window. The meta-analysis itself is not a 'world event'.
